description: A_FB^b extraction using published ALEPH charge separations and MC-calibrated flavour fractions to correct for finite b-purity and charm contamination. This replaces the naive slope/sigma(Q_h) method which overestimates the physical delta_b.
mc_note: On symmetric MC, A_FB^b = 0 by construction. Values here reflect noise + charm correction residuals. Valid comparison requires Phase 4b/4c data.
